steps.title: Use the zero product rule
steps.content:
The constant factor $-4$ is not zero, so one of the binomial factors must equal zero:
$$w-7=0$$
$$w-3=0$$
$$w+8=0$$

steps.title: Match a listed solution
steps.content:
Solving those equations gives
$$w=7,\quad w=3,\quad w=-8$$Among the choices, only $7$ is listed. The answer is C.
